title: Menu
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Menu primitive preserving model-owned open, submenu, highlighted, checked, and radio state, popup/menu ARIA, local keyboard navigation, typeahead, disabled items, grouping, separators, arrows, deterministic placement attributes, and dismiss events.

registry.reason: Menu reuses the local Popover focus command and deterministic placement conventions without creating another overlay stack.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, and keyboard event helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open, highlighted, submenu, checkbox, and radio state are model-owned inputs and interactions emit typed facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow and keeps menu state in the consuming model.

deviations.summary: Focus handoff and restoration reuse the Popover command-facing helpers instead of hiding side effects inside render helpers.
deviations.rationale: Menu side effects must stay at Foldkit's Command boundary. The installable view remains pure and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Placement is represented through deterministic side, align, offset, collision, positioner, popup, and submenu attributes without DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not an ad hoc Menu render helper side effect.
